positive: Minimalist graphic illustration of a soaring crescent moon and celestial constellations, stylized with clean black lines and pops of deep indigo, cyan, and gold foil accents. The composition features the celestial bodies arranged in a graceful arc across the center, surrounded by abstract, fluid stellar dust and stylized mountain peaks silhouetted on the horizon. Use high contrast, geometric shapes mixed with organic curves, and an overall retro-minimalist poster aesthetic. Centered, perfectly scaled for repeating apparel print. Vector art style, clean lines, maximal negative space.
negative: blur, noisy, dirty, grainy, watercolor, photorealistic, complex background, illegible text, signatures, logos, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermarks, low detail, artifacts
